body.title: Move filesystem.py to utility_closet/filesystem as rack shelf
body.result: Partial shim landed (62f8c342): same pattern as budget. Canonical UC path + eventual inversion blocked on same registry migration. 29 tests pass.
body.description:
Final piece of T-uc-module-migration-epic. Move wild_igor/igor/tools/filesystem.py into lab/utility_closet/filesystem/ as a rack shelf.

## Scope
- Create lab/utility_closet/filesystem/ with shelf module
- Move filesystem tool code
- Register as UC rack module; health reports sandbox root, disk usage, recent operations count
- Add comms://log/filesystem channel for audit (every file op)
- Thin re-export shim at wild_igor/igor/tools/filesystem.py during transition
- Tests pass at both import paths

## Sandbox considerations
- filesystem.py operates in a sandboxed space — make sure the sandbox root config follows the move
- Igor still uses the shelf through the same tool registry; no cognition-layer changes expected

## Success criteria
- All existing filesystem-tool tests pass
- Old and new import paths both resolve during transition
- UC health dashboard shows filesystem shelf

## Related
- T-uc-module-migration-epic (parent, closes after this)
